title: Scheduled reference/dependency refresh + CI canary
context: Sustainability cadence: a scheduled refresh of references/dependencies plus a CI canary that catches drift before it breaks reproducibility (PLAN backlog/M4). Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Add a scheduled reference/dependency-refresh workflow and a CI canary that detects reproducibility drift on a regular cadence.
acceptanceCriteria: A scheduled workflow refreshes pinned references/dependencies and opens a PR for review (no auto-merge).
A CI canary re-runs the fixture on a cadence and flags reproducibility drift.
Pins remain digest-based; no ':latest' introduced by the refresh.
output: A pull request adding scheduled reference/dependency refresh + a CI canary.
